passing_score_scale: AFQT percentile score 1-99. Branch-specific line scores determine job (MOS/rating) eligibility.
exam_format: Computer-adaptive (CAT) or paper multiple choice; 10 subtests

testing_centers.notes: CAT-ASVAB administered at 65 MEPS locations nationwide. Paper ASVAB at some recruiting offices. Contact a military recruiter to schedule.
Career exploration version administered at participating high schools. Not valid for enlistment.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Recruiter will coordinate identity verification prior to MEPS appointment.
exam_rules: Free test administered by the U.S. military. Government-issued ID required. No study materials, notes, or electronic devices allowed during test. Candidates must be accompanied or referred by a military recruiter for enlistment versions.

retake_policy.notes: 1-month wait after first attempt, 1 month after second attempt, then 6-month waiting periods for each subsequent attempt. Recruiter authorization required to retest.

official_study_resources.title: ASVAB Practice Tests
official_study_resources.notes: Free official sample questions available at officialasvab.com.
